svg.text: MacBook Pro Bottom View (Case Removed) · Connector Zone Assessment · Repair Workflow

g.text: Use spudger to lift latch tab gently.
Slide cable straight out of connector.
Required: Spudger, 99% IPA, lint-free swabs, magnification
Manual clean (10–15 min) · IPA swab + brush
Ultrasonic bath needed · 40 kHz, 5–10 min cycle
ZIF connectors are designed for disconnect/reconnect
cycles. The FPC cable slides out cleanly, exposing
all 36 pads for direct IPA cleaning. No soldering
or microsoldering required for this repair step.

svg.text: 820-02757-06 Logic Board · Cleaning Access Render · Cola Spill Incident Documentation
Component positions approximate from decoded boardview · Bottom-up view orientation
